name: 30" x 30" Pattern Portrait by Adekunle Adeleke Framed Wall Canvas - Threshold™: Modern Digital Art, Polystyrene Frame
description:
The 30" x 30" Pattern Portrait by Adekunle Adeleke Framed Wall Canvas - Threshold™ is a stunning piece of artwork that showcases the artist's unique style and creativity. The canvas features a portrait of a human face composed of colorful geometric patterns. This 30" x 30" Pattern Portrait by Adekunle Adeleke Framed Wall Canvas - Threshold™ is a perfect addition to any modern or contemporary space, adding a bold and artistic statement to any room.

Casual classics for house and home.
